content: Introduction This is the first part of the Harpy Primer, a guide to the position of Harpy within the Camarilla. The position of harpy can be a very hard role to play, both for storytellers and players, yet the position is very i port ant to the integrity of the Camarilla. The following is a guide to help those interested in playing a harpy. The history of the position, what is all included with the power of the harpy, socializing and snubs, and the organization of harpies themselves. This primer is designed to help both new and expel rienced players understand the history of the harpy position. The harpy can be a very intimidating position, but can offer a compelling and intriguing ob sta clue for players to overcome. New players can use it to help understand the position and utilize it to enhance their role play. Experienced players can enrich their knowledge and use this as a way to expand their role playing. Storytellers are welcome to use what works for their games and adapt what they need to fit their story. This packet uses the rules for V20 Vampire the Masquerade specifically, but can be adapted for other editions as needed. A Harpies Primer 5

Communication and Organization The position of harpy has been in place since the formation of the Camarilla. The purpose of the harpy is to be the arbiter for overseeing the currency of boons and to maintain the pecking order of status within the sect. In the bigger pic sure, the harpy is the one that keeps neonates from rising up against their elders, though it is not outwardly the perception. The system is set up specifically to keep elders ahead in the game and give them an unfair advantage, and the po sit ion of harpy is setup to ensure that advantage is kept. The harpy is the gatekeeper for how far 12 A Harpies Primer

The Harpy''Ss Primer The harpies of the Camarilla area force to be reckoned with. From social influences, to being the arbiter of boons, the currency of the Camarilla, they can move the Camarilla in whatever direction they wish. The Harpy Primer is the first of 3 different guides on the position, and is a introduction to getting off on the right foot as a harpy. Both for players and storytellers, this guide is a base to build up on for the position. The Harpy Primer includes: • The position within the Camarilla; • In Character introductions to Np harpies; • The History of the position; • How to Socialize; • Rumors surrounding the harpies; • Organization and Communication between harpies. A Harpies Primer 13
